body: BEGIN GET DIAGNOSTICS n := ROW_COUNT; END

comment: CURRENT keyword deparses to plain form
body: BEGIN GET CURRENT DIAGNOSTICS n := ROW_COUNT; END
BEGIN GET DIAGNOSTICS n := ROW_COUNT, oid := PG_ROUTINE_OID; END
BEGIN GET DIAGNOSTICS rec.count := ROW_COUNT; END
BEGIN GET DIAGNOSTICS ctx := PG_CONTEXT; END

comment: GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS with error item
body: BEGIN GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS s := RETURNED_SQLSTATE; END
BEGIN GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS c := COLUMN_NAME, t := TABLE_NAME, m := MESSAGE_TEXT; END
BEGIN GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS ctx := PG_CONTEXT; END
BEGIN GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS n := ROW_COUNT; END
error: diagnostics item ROW_COUNT is not allowed in GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS

body: BEGIN GET DIAGNOSTICS m := MESSAGE_TEXT; END
error: diagnostics item MESSAGE_TEXT is not allowed in GET CURRENT DIAGNOSTICS

body: BEGIN GET DIAGNOSTICS x := BOGUS; END
